summary: South Bay startups rode a funding wave this spring, pulling in over $4 billion across 24 rounds—with AI dominating the landscape. Nexthop AI, Ayar Labs, and Mind Robotics each secured half-billion-dollar checks, while hardware plays like Frore Systems and SiFive landed their largest rounds yet. Most of the region's tech workforce remains stable, though seven companies are actively hiring to capitalize on fresh capital.
